channel.title: Optitrans on संस्कृत-साङ्गणकाः Sanskrit Programmers
channel.description: Recent content in Optitrans on संस्कृत-साङ्गणकाः Sanskrit Programmers

item.title: Optitrans V1
item.description: OptItrans is optimal Indic transliteration. Type indic scripts with minimal effort. For general philosophy and history, see main page. The latest transliteration table is always available in this online spreadsheet. It lists transliteration rules from OptiTrans and several other popular schemes (including Baraha, Harvard-Kyoto, ITRANS, Velthuis, IAST) for easy comparison. Examples shankara manju - शङ्कर मञ्जु shiv shankar (while writing hindI) - शिव शङ्कर shiv shankar (while writing Samskrita) - शिव् शङ्कर् ak.

item.title: Optitrans v2
item.description: OptItrans is optimal Indic transliteration. This version is specially meant for typing convenience. Type indic scripts with minimal effort. For general philosophy and history, see main page. The latest transliteration table is always available in this online spreadsheet. It lists transliteration rules from OptiTrans and several other popular schemes (including Baraha, Harvard-Kyoto, ITRANS, Velthuis, IAST) for easy comparison. Highlights and examples Avoiding unnecessary ‘a’s. kml or kamala : कमल Typing vyanjana-s with a virAma
